backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a lemon billing backend with customer management, transactions, credit payments, and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the fix for AddCustomerModal, listing affected files, related components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, briefly describing the purpose and key changes in each component, hook, and page.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Lemon Billing PWA, referencing the app manifest, icons, and registering a service worker on load.
frontend/public/manifest.webmanifest: PWA web app manifest for Lemon Billing defining app name, icons, display mode, theme colors, and categories.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing cache-first strategies for static assets and navigation, bypassing IC/Internet Identity network calls, with versioned cache management on install and activate.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up TanStack Router with four lazy-loaded routes (Home, CustomerDetail, BillSummary, MySummary) wrapped in LanguageProvider and a Suspense fallback.
frontend/src/components/AddCustomerModal: Modal form for adding a new customer that handles online/offline states, validates inputs, calls the useAddCustomer mutation, and clears form state on success or close.
frontend/src/components/BillLayout.tsx: Renders a formatted sales bill card showing customer info, transaction details (quantity, rate, total), and balance summary including previous credit and net credit/payment.
frontend/src/components/CreditPaymentLis: Displays a single credit payment transaction as an expandable list item with payment amount, resulting balance, date, and a delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/CustomerDashboar: Shows a customer profile card with avatar, phone number, current credit balance status, and account creation date.
frontend/src/components/CustomerListItem: Renders a linked list row for a customer showing their avatar, phone, last transaction date, previous due badge, and current credit balance.
frontend/src/components/InstallAppBanner: Displays a PWA install prompt banner with platform-aware install button or iOS step-by-step instructions dialog, dismissible by the user.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the app shell with a sticky header (back navigation, logo, language selector) and an offline/sync status banner that shows pending changes and retry options.
frontend/src/components/LoadingSpinner.t: Simple full-screen loading spinner component with a spinning circle and 'Loading...' text.
frontend/src/components/SummaryBanner.ts: Displays a three-card summary banner showing total customer count, total lemons sold, and total credit due, using localized labels.
frontend/src/components/TransactionEntry: Form component for adding a new lemon transaction (date, quantity, rate, debit) for a given customer, with validation and navigation to the generated bill on success.
frontend/src/components/TransactionListI: Renders a single transaction row with expandable details, a bill navigation button, and a delete action protected by a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for multi-language support (en/hi/mr/kn), persisting the selected language to localStorage and exposing a translation helper `t`.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via `AuthClient`, exposing login/clear functions, identity state, and login status through a React context and `useInternetIdentity` hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useOfflineSync.ts: Hook that tracks online/offline status and syncs queued offline operations (addCustomer, addTransaction, payCreditDue) to the backend actor when connectivity is restored.
frontend/src/hooks/usePWAInstall.ts: Custom React hook that manages PWA installation state, including detecting if the app is already installed, handling the native browser install prompt, and providing iOS Safari-specific install instructions with persistent dismiss support.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralized React Query hooks for all backend data operations including user profiles, customers, transactions, credit payments, and balances, with offline queuing support for mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useTransactionCalcula: Memoized hook that computes total transaction amount and net credit balance from quantity, rate, previous credit, and today's payment inputs.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Defines translation strings for English, Hindi, Marathi, and Kannada languages covering all UI labels, error messages, and prompts used throughout the app.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, imports Inter and Nunito fonts, defines a lemon-themed OKLCH color palette with light/dark mode CSS variables, and includes print styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/BillSummaryView.tsx: Page component that displays a printable bill for a specific transaction, with buttons to print or share via WhatsApp using formatted bill text.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDetailPage.ts: Customer detail page that shows a dashboard, unified chronological list of transactions and credit payments, a transaction entry form, and controls for paying credit due and deleting the customer.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main home page component that renders the customer list, summary banner, login screen, and profile setup modal, with memoized CustomerRow components fetching per-customer balance and transaction data.
frontend/src/pages/MySummaryPage.tsx: Summary dashboard page displaying business metrics (total customers, lemons sold, rupees collected, credit due, profit/loss) as styled metric cards with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/utils/formatBillText.ts: Utility that formats a customer transaction into a URL-encoded plain-text bill string using i18n translations for WhatsApp or SMS sharing.
frontend/src/utils/offlineQueue.ts: IndexedDB-backed offline queue that stores, retrieves, and removes pending mutation operations (addCustomer, addTransaction, payCreditDue) for syncing when the app comes back online.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence and hash cleanup helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom lemon-brand colors, fonts, border radii, shadows, and accordion animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, known issues, and existing feature requests, currently flagging the AddCustomerModal submission flow as broken and requiring a fix.
